tiktok_script:
Hook: Here's something nobody talks about — having just one income stream isn't stability. It's a single point of failure.

Beat 1: Think about it. If that one source disappears — layoff, hours cut, contract ends — everything stops. Most of us were never taught to build a backup. We were taught to get a good job and hold on.

Beat 2: The people who feel financially calm right now aren't earning more — they've got multiple streams working. Not overnight, not magically. They built systems, one layer at a time. That's learnable. That's a skill.

Beat 3: The Passive Income Blueprint is a $17 digital guide that walks you through exactly how to start building those layers — even if you have no experience and limited time. It's a one-time purchase, instant download, no subscription. Costs less than dinner out and you keep it forever.

CTA: If you've been telling yourself you'll figure out a backup plan eventually — this Sunday is a good day to actually start. Link is in the bio. Go grab it.
graphic_subline: Build your backup plan. Simple system, instant access.
